CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'listview'), cfp_Number_of_ListViews__c, IF( ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'report'), 2 * cfp_Number_of_Reports__c, IF( ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'automation rule') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Compact Layout') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'config') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Flexipage') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Page Layout') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Email Template') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Action Button') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Criteria Search and Filter') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'workflow'), IF(cfp_is_API_Call__c, 2, 1), 0 ) ) )
CustomField.label: isConfig
